description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet to demonstrate circle inversion. Construct a circle centered at the origin (0,0) with radius 3 and a free point P. Construct the inverse of point P with respect to the circle. Create a line that does not pass through the origin (e.g., x = 4) and construct its inverse with respect to the circle. Include a text annotation showing the product of distances OP * OP'. Save the project as 'circle_inversion.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
